name: Team RWBY: Vytal Reunions
description:
(REQUEST!) Two years after Salem's defeat, the Vytal Tournament returns baby! And who else has the honor for the first match, than the heroes? However, their first round goes against a figure returned from the pages of history, thanks to the Staff of Creation. The Legendary Fighter: You.
